subject: Clean R_MacroData.sql file
commit_message:
Clean R_MacroData.sql file

Updated file to only have one INSERT statement for each macro table
instead of multiple INSERT/UPDATE statements across the file making
it difficult to work with.

Change-Id: I6ff934befbd4f54e6338388cdb3e11b2a8b8de63
Issue-ID: SO-3706
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Premont-Tendland <sebastien.premont@bell.ca>

Patch Set 4:

I tested this by creating a fresh database first and then modify R__MacroData with the changes in this patch.
All tables were exactly the same in content except for orchestration_flow_reference where the SEQ_NO value is now consistent where in the old script you had gaps and sometimes SEQ_NO starting at 3 instead of 1.

I also updated the macro Activate and Assign to use ControllerExecutionBB instead of ConfigAssignBB and ConfigDeployBB to be consistent with the create and delete macro.
